---
title: "Factor Libary"
--- 

This app provides access to the factor library described in *Uncertainty Everywhere* (Gruber, Kastner, Voigt, and Weiss, 2024). It covers 50 firm characteristics and over 400,000 high-minus-low portfolio return series constructed from different formation methods. Select a sorting variable and portfolio parameters below to explore the resulting return series. Data is fetched on demand from [HuggingFace](https://huggingface.co/datasets/tidy-finance/factor-library) and cached in your browser for the session.

:::{.column-screen-inset}

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 1200px
library(poorman)
library(nanoparquet)
library(base64enc)

sv_info <- data.frame(
  sorting_variable = c(
    "52w",
    "aci",
    "ag",
    "ami",
    "beta",
    "bm",
    "cbop",
    "cdi",
    "cfm",
    "csi",
    "dbe",
    "dcol",
    "dfnl",
    "dinv",
    "dm",
    "dnoa",
    "dpia",
    "dtv",
    "dwc",
    "ebm",
    "em",
    "gpa",
    "hr",
    "ig",
    "iskew",
    "ivol",
    "mdr",
    "me",
    "mom",
    "ndf",
    "ndm",
    "nef",
    "noa",
    "npy",
    "nxf",
    "o",
    "oa",
    "ocm",
    "ol",
    "ope",
    "rer",
    "rev",
    "rmom",
    "roa",
    "roe",
    "rs",
    "sm",
    "sue",
    "tbi",
    "tur"
  ),
  full_name = c(
    "52-Week High",
    "Abnormal Corporate Investment",
    "Asset Growth",
    "Amihud Illiquidity",
    "Beta",
    "Book-to-Market",
    "Cash-Based Operating Profitability",
    "Composite Debt Issuance",
    "Cash Flow to Market",
    "Composite Share Issuance",
    "Change in Common Equity",
    "Change in Current Operating Liabilities",
    "Change in Financial Liabilities",
    "Inventory Changes",
    "Debt to Market",
    "Change in Net Operating Assets",
    "Change in PPE and Intangibles",
    "Dollar Trading Volume",
    "Change in Working Capital",
    "Enterprise Book to Market",
    "Earnings to Market",
    "Gross Profits to Assets",
    "Hiring Rate",
    "Investment Growth",
    "Idiosyncratic Skewness",
    "Idiosyncratic Volatility",
    "Maximum Daily Return",
    "Market Equity",
    "Momentum",
    "Net Debt Financing",
    "Net Debt to Market",
    "Net Equity Financing",
    "Net Operating Assets",
    "Net Payout Yield",
    "Net External Financing",
    "O-Score",
    "Operating Accruals",
    "Operating Cash Flow to Market",
    "Operating Leverage",
    "Operating Efficiency",
    "Real-Estate Ratio",
    "Long-Term Reversal",
    "Residual Momentum",
    "Return on Assets",
    "Return on Equity",
    "Relative Strength",
    "Sales to Market",
    "Standardized Unexpected Earnings",
    "Taxable Income to Book Income",
    "Share Turnover"
  ),
  direction = c(
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "top_minus_bottom",
    "bottom_minus_top",
    "bottom_minus_top"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

sv_choices <- setNames(
  paste0("sv_", sv_info$sorting_variable),
  paste0(sv_info$sorting_variable, " (", sv_info$full_name, ")")
)

CACHE_DIR <- file.path(tempdir(), "factor_library_cache")
dir.create(CACHE_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

download_cached <- function(url, filename) {
  path <- file.path(CACHE_DIR, filename)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    download.file(url, path, mode = "wb", quiet = TRUE)
  }
  path
}

grid_url <- paste0(
  "https://huggingface.co/datasets/tidy-finance/factor-library-grid/",
  "resolve/refs%2Fconvert%2Fparquet/default/train/0000.parquet"
)
grid_path <- download_cached(grid_url, "grid.parquet")

grid <- read_parquet(grid_path)

tf_colors <- c("#3B9AB2FF", "#78B7C5FF", "#EBCC2AFF", "#E1AF00FF", "#F21A00FF")
tf_primary <- tf_colors[1]
tf_secondary <- tf_colors[5]
tf_accent <- tf_colors[3]
tf_muted <- tf_colors[2]


ui <- fluidPage(
  shiny::useBusyIndicators(),
  tags$head(
    tags$style(HTML(sprintf(
      "
    body { font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; }
    h2 { color: %s; }
    .sidebar { background-color: #f8f9fa; }
    .btn-default { background-color: %s; color: white; border-color: %s; }
    .btn-default:hover { background-color: %s; color: white; border-color: %s; }
    a { color: %s; }
    a:hover { color: %s; }
    hr { border-top: 2px solid %s; }
  ",
      tf_primary,
      tf_primary,
      tf_primary,
      tf_secondary,
      tf_secondary,
      tf_primary,
      tf_secondary,
      tf_muted
    ))),
    tags$script(HTML(
      "
  Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler('download_file', function(msg) {
    var a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = 'data:' + msg.type + ';base64,' + msg.data;
    a.download = msg.filename;
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
  });
"
    ))
  ),

  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectizeInput(
        "sorting_variable",
        "Sorting variable",
        choices = sv_choices,
        selected = sv_choices[["bm (Book-to-Market)"]],
        options = list(placeholder = "Type to search...")
      ),
      uiOutput("sv_detail"),
      radioButtons(
        "sorting_variable_lag",
        "Lag",
        c("3 months" = "3m", "6 months" = "6m", "Fama-French style" = "ff"),
        selected = "3m"
      ),
      radioButtons(
        "rebalancing",
        "Rebalancing",
        c("Monthly" = "monthly", "Annual" = "annual"),
        selected = "annual"
      ),
      radioButtons(
        "breakpoints_main",
        "Breakpoints",
        c("Five" = 5, "Ten" = 10),
        selected = 10
      ),
      radioButtons(
        "sorting_method",
        "Sorting method",
        c(
          "Univariate" = "univariate",
          "Bivariate (dependent)" = "bivariate-dependent",
          "Bivariate (independent)" = "bivariate-independent"
        ),
        selected = "bivariate-dependent"
      ),
      conditionalPanel(
        "input.sorting_method != 'univariate'",
        radioButtons(
          "breakpoints_secondary",
          "Secondary breakpoints",
          c("Two" = 2, "Five" = 5),
          selected = 2
        )
      ),
      radioButtons(
        "breakpoints_exchanges",
        "Exchanges",
        c("NYSE only" = "NYSE", "All exchanges" = "AMEX|NASDAQ|NYSE"),
        selected = "NYSE"
      ),
      radioButtons(
        "weighting_scheme",
        "Weighting",
        c("Equal-weighted" = "EW", "Value-weighted" = "VW"),
        selected = "VW"
      ),
      radioButtons(
        "exclude_size",
        "Exclude small firms?",
        c("No" = 0, "Smallest 20%" = 0.2),
        selected = 0.2
      ),
      checkboxInput("exclude_financials", "Exclude financials", FALSE),
      checkboxInput("exclude_utilities", "Exclude utilities", FALSE),
      checkboxInput(
        "exclude_negative_earnings",
        "Exclude negative earnings",
        FALSE
      ),
      actionButton("download_csv", "Download CSV"),
      actionButton("download_parquet", "Download Parquet")
    ),

    mainPanel(
      plotOutput("plot"),
      tableOutput("summary_table"),
      h4("Download via R"),
      p(
        "You can download this portfolio return series programmatically",
        "using the",
        tags$a(
          "tidyfinance",
          href = "https://cran.r-project.org/package=tidyfinance",
          target = "_blank"
        ),
        "R package:"
      ),
      uiOutput("code_snippet")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  output$sv_detail <- renderUI({
    req(input$sorting_variable)
    sv_key <- sub("^sv_", "", input$sorting_variable)
    info <- sv_info %>% filter(sorting_variable == sv_key)
    req(nrow(info) > 0)

    direction_label <- if (info$direction == "top_minus_bottom") {
      "Long top, short bottom"
    } else {
      "Long bottom, short top"
    }

    tags$div(
      style = sprintf(
        "background-color: %s20; border-left: 3px solid %s; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9em;",
        tf_primary,
        tf_primary
      ),
      tags$strong(info$full_name),
      tags$br(),
      tags$span(
        style = "color: #666;",
        paste("HML direction:", direction_label)
      )
    )
  })

  matched_id <- reactive({
    res <- grid %>%
      filter(
        sorting_variable == input$sorting_variable,
        sorting_variable_lag == input$sorting_variable_lag,
        rebalancing == input$rebalancing,
        breakpoints_main == as.numeric(input$breakpoints_main),
        sorting_method == input$sorting_method,
        breakpoints_exchanges == input$breakpoints_exchanges,
        weighting_scheme == input$weighting_scheme,
        exclude_size == as.numeric(input$exclude_size),
        exclude_financials == input$exclude_financials,
        exclude_utilities == input$exclude_utilities,
        exclude_negative_earnings == input$exclude_negative_earnings
      )

    if (input$sorting_method != "univariate") {
      res <- res %>%
        filter(breakpoints_secondary == as.numeric(input$breakpoints_secondary))
    }

    res %>%
      head(1) %>%
      pull(id)
  })

  factor_data <- reactive({
    req(length(matched_id()) > 0)

    sv <- sub("^sv_", "", input$sorting_variable)
    lag <- input$sorting_variable_lag
    cache_file <- paste0(sv, "_", lag, ".parquet")

    url <- sprintf(
      "https://huggingface.co/datasets/tidy-finance/factor-library/resolve/main/factor-library/sorting_variable=%s/sorting_variable_lag=%s/part-0.parquet",
      sv,
      lag
    )

    target_id <- matched_id()

    withProgress(message = "Fetching data...", {
      path <- download_cached(url, cache_file)
      dat <- read_parquet(path)
      dat %>%
        filter(id == target_id) %>%
        arrange(date, ret_type)
    })
  })

  output$code_snippet <- renderUI({
    sv <- sub("^sv_", "", input$sorting_variable)

    args <- c(
      sprintf('sorting_variable = "%s"', sv),
      sprintf('sorting_variable_lag = "%s"', input$sorting_variable_lag),
      sprintf('rebalancing = "%s"', input$rebalancing),
      sprintf('breakpoints_main = %s', input$breakpoints_main),
      sprintf('sorting_method = "%s"', input$sorting_method),
      sprintf('breakpoints_exchanges = "%s"', input$breakpoints_exchanges),
      sprintf('weighting_scheme = "%s"', input$weighting_scheme),
      sprintf('exclude_size = %s', input$exclude_size),
      sprintf('exclude_financials = %s', toupper(input$exclude_financials)),
      sprintf('exclude_utilities = %s', toupper(input$exclude_utilities)),
      sprintf(
        'exclude_negative_earnings = %s',
        toupper(input$exclude_negative_earnings)
      )
    )

    if (input$sorting_method != "univariate") {
      args <- c(
        args,
        sprintf('breakpoints_secondary = %s', input$breakpoints_secondary)
      )
    }

    code <- paste0(
      "library(tidyfinance)\n\n",
      "download_data(\n",
      '  "tidyfinance", "factor_library",\n',
      paste0("  ", args, collapse = ",\n"),
      "\n)"
    )

    print(code)

    tags$pre(
      style = "white-space: pre; display: block; ...",
      tags$code(
        code
      )
    )
  })

  sv_full_name <- reactive({
    sv_key <- sub("^sv_", "", input$sorting_variable)
    info <- sv_info %>% filter(sorting_variable == sv_key)
    if (nrow(info) > 0) info$full_name else sv_key
  })

  output$plot <- renderPlot({
    req(nrow(factor_data()) > 0)

    dat <- factor_data()
    dat$date <- as.Date(dat$date)

    dat <- dat %>%
      group_by(ret_type) %>%
      arrange(date) %>%
      mutate(cumret = cumprod(1 + ret) - 1) %>%
      ungroup()

    ew <- dat[dat$ret_type == "ew", ]
    vw <- dat[dat$ret_type == "vw", ]

    ylim <- range(dat$cumret, na.rm = TRUE)
    xlim <- range(dat$date, na.rm = TRUE)

    plot(
      ew$date,
      ew$cumret,
      type = "l",
      lwd = 2,
      col = tf_primary,
      xlim = xlim,
      ylim = ylim,
      main = sprintf("Cumulative HML returns: %s", sv_full_name()),
      xlab = "",
      ylab = "Cumulative return",
      yaxt = "n"
    )
    lines(vw$date, vw$cumret, lwd = 2, col = tf_secondary)

    at <- axTicks(2)
    axis(2, at = at, labels = sprintf("%.0f%%", at * 100))

    legend(
      "topleft",
      legend = c("Equal-weighted", "Value-weighted"),
      col = c(tf_primary, tf_secondary),
      lwd = 2,
      bty = "n"
    )
  })

  output$summary_table <- renderTable(
    {
      req(nrow(factor_data()) > 0)
      factor_data() %>%
        mutate(
          Weighting = ifelse(
            ret_type == "ew",
            "Equal-weighted",
            "Value-weighted"
          )
        ) %>%
        group_by(Weighting) %>%
        summarise(
          `Start date` = as.character(min(date)),
          `End date` = as.character(max(date)),
          Observations = n(),
          `Mean return` = sprintf("%.2f%%", mean(ret) * 100),
          `Std. dev.` = sprintf("%.2f%%", sd(ret) * 100),
          `Sharpe ratio` = sprintf("%.2f", mean(ret) / sd(ret) * sqrt(12)),
          Minimum = sprintf("%.2f%%", min(ret) * 100),
          Maximum = sprintf("%.2f%%", max(ret) * 100),
          .groups = "drop"
        )
    },
    striped = TRUE,
    hover = TRUE,
    bordered = TRUE
  )

  observeEvent(input$download_csv, {
    req(nrow(factor_data()) > 0)
    tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")
    write.csv(factor_data(), tmp, row.names = FALSE)
    b64 <- base64enc::base64encode(tmp)
    fname <- sprintf("factor_id_%s.csv", matched_id())
    session$sendCustomMessage(
      "download_file",
      list(
        data = b64,
        filename = fname,
        type = "text/csv"
      )
    )
  })

  observeEvent(input$download_parquet, {
    req(nrow(factor_data()) > 0)
    tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".parquet")
    write_parquet(factor_data(), tmp)
    b64 <- base64enc::base64encode(tmp)
    fname <- sprintf("factor_id_%s.parquet", matched_id())
    session$sendCustomMessage(
      "download_file",
      list(
        data = b64,
        filename = fname,
        type = "application/octet-stream"
      )
    )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```

:::
